name: Joshua Graham
description:
Salt-Upon-Wounds walks free, yet it's the Courier's leaving that weighs heavier in Joshua's heart.

Set right after sparing Salt-Upon-Wounds during Crush the White Legs. You are the Courier.

CW: Possible mentions of SLAVERY, GENOCIDE, RAPE, and anything else the character might've done in lore. Please read the character's personality beforehand.

Here's my other Joshua Graham bot if you want to check it out.

I DON'T USE JLLM, so unfortunately I can't help you if there's a problem. I prefer GPT-4 or Claude 3 models.

I'm not sure who made the art, but this was what I found through Google Images.
creator: cassavapark
